_comment: Structured return for ONE critic agent. Pass this as the `schema` to each critic so its report is consistent and machine-comparable at synthesis. The synthesis stage reads many of these and looks for convergence (fact) vs divergence (a fork).

lens.description: this critic's point of view, e.g. 'ruthless editor' or 'security auditor'

read.description: what the artifact actually IS, experienced cold from THIS lens — honest, specific, the felt/observed truth, not a summary

keep.description: the few things that are genuinely good/correct/beautiful and must NOT be touched — cite specifics

remove.description: specific cuts, ranked by impact — quote the actual line/element/function and give a one-line why. be ruthless

change.description: specific alterations (copy, color, weight, order, timing, naming, structure, severity for bugs) — NOT additions

add.description: only where the artifact is GENUINELY thin — a real gap, not 'more features'. usually short or empty; bias hard against adding

biggestFlaw.description: the single worst problem from this lens

biggestOpportunity.description: the one move that would most raise this artifact — a subtraction is a valid and often best answer

verdict.description: one or two sentences: the honest bottom line from this lens
